title: Ledger Reconciliation
summary: Extend an existing exact-ID reconciler so it can compare related internal ledger rows and external bank rows in a realistic one-to-one matching workflow.

evidence.note: Based on Ramp's wording: extend an existing Python backend system and build logic that connects or compares related records in a realistic data-driven scenario.

rubric.label: Codebase comprehension
rubric.excellent: Accurately explains current exact-ID flow, report shape, and where matching belongs before editing.

rubric.label: Problem framing
rubric.excellent: Clarifies matching rules, tie behavior, date tolerance, and one-to-one assignment.

rubric.label: AI direction
rubric.excellent: Uses AI for repo summary, edge cases, tests, and review without delegating ownership.

rubric.label: Command of solution
rubric.excellent: Can defend the matching invariant and reject broad rewrites or unsafe AI suggestions.

rubric.label: MVP judgment
rubric.excellent: Ships a small practical extension without redesigning the whole service.

rubric.label: Correctness
rubric.excellent: Handles exact matches, fuzzy candidates, one-to-one use, unmatched rows, and ambiguity.

rubric.label: Testing and validation
rubric.excellent: Adds or explains focused tests and runs visible/hidden checks frequently.

rubric.label: Tradeoff reasoning
rubric.excellent: Names limitations such as merchant normalization weakness and production matching confidence.

rubric.label: Communication and cadence
rubric.excellent: Narrates checkpoints, risk, and next action at a steady pace.

checkpoints.title: Read the code
checkpoints.prompt: Summarize the current implementation in 3 bullets. Where does the new behavior belong?

checkpoints.title: Frame ambiguity
checkpoints.prompt: What clarifying questions would you ask the interviewer? What assumptions are you making for the MVP?

checkpoints.title: MVP plan
checkpoints.prompt: What is your implementation plan and what tests prove it?

checkpoints.title: Risk check
checkpoints.prompt: What is the biggest remaining risk or failing case?

checkpoints.title: Final explanation
checkpoints.prompt: Explain your invariant, tradeoff, validation steps, and how AI helped.
